description: Vertical 'Labor News' headline card. The photograph shows the exterior of a building: a tall dark monument-style sign in the right foreground reads 'Frances Perkins Building,' bears the gold Department of Labor seal, and the gold text 'United States Department of Labor' with a partial address '200 Constitution Ave NW' below. Behind it is the building's tan concrete facade with a large American flag hanging vertically across several stories at left. The lower portion fades to dark navy with a faint embossed DOL seal watermark at lower right. A small blue tab with white italic serif text reads 'Labor News' (with three vertical accent bars). Below, white serif headline text reads: 'US Department of Labor launches new tools to help businesses strengthen supply chains, stop unfair foreign labor practices.' Lower-right small white text reads 'DOL.GOV.'
notable_text: Labor News - US Department of Labor launches new tools to help businesses strengthen supply chains, stop unfair foreign labor practices / DOL.GOV
